chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3372 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability. 21.02.2025 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Afsheen Aman, advocate for the respondents 2 & 3. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel, this petition pertains to a demand notice issued thereto without adjudication. Copy whereof is placed at page 37 of the court file. Counsel for the respondent department admits that the notice is without adjudication and in such regard states that the same shall be withdrawn forthwith. The respondent’s counsel states that the petition may be disposed of in view of the aforesaid, however, subject to right of department to initiate any proceedings in accordance with law. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
